title: <human sheet title>

source.as_of: <vintage, e.g. 'Aug 2020' — ALWAYS set; this dates every answer built on the table>
source.captured_date: <optional: when the data was collected, if different from as_of>

summary: <2-3 plain sentences: what this table is, what it is FOR, why a rep would touch it>
use_cases: <a real question this table is the right source for>
<another — cover lookup, ranking/aggregation, and segment/filter styles>
entity_key_col: <the column holding the normalizable entity name, or null>

columns.name: <exact column header>
columns.note: <terse: units, sparsity, meaning — only when non-obvious>

examples: <2-3 representative rows as objects; include one populated + one sparse/edge case>

not_answerable.q: <a plausible question this table CANNOT answer>

warnings: <two-row header | trailing space in sheet name | mostly-empty col | near-duplicate | epoch-date artifact>
